violations.description: Ensure role attribute has an appropriate value for the element
violations.help: ARIA role should be appropriate for the element

violations.description: Ensure <iframe> and <frame> elements have an accessible name
violations.help: Frames must have an accessible name

violations.description: Ensure elements have alternative text or a role of none or presentation
Ensure image alternative is not repeated as text
violations.help: Alternative text of images should not be repeated as text

violations.description: Ensure every form element has a label
Ensure the banner landmark is at top level
violations.help: Banner landmark should not be contained in another landmark
Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination

violations.description: Ensure links are distinguished from surrounding text in a way that does not rely on color
violations.help: Links must be distinguishable without relying on color

violations.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
violations.help: All page content should be contained by landmarks
